command:
echo '=== vm-claude-hub (.191) ==='
hostname && uname -r
echo '--- Services ---'
systemctl is-active n8n claude-poller.service 2>/dev/null | paste - - | awk '{print "  n8n="$1" poller="$2}'
systemctl is-active gitea 2>/dev/null && echo "  gitea=active" || docker ps 2>/dev/null | grep -i gitea | awk '{print "  gitea(docker)="$7}' || echo "  gitea=unknown"
echo '--- Disk ---'
df -h / | tail -1 | awk '{print "  root: "$3"/"$2" ("$5" used)"}'
echo '--- n8n version ---'
node /usr/bin/n8n --version 2>/dev/null | head -1 || n8n --version 2>/dev/null | head -1
echo DONE_1884
